item.title: AI in Healthcare
item.description:
• Summary: The conversation around artificial intelligence in healthcare is evolving beyond hype, according to STAT News. The article discusses how AI applications are maturing and moving toward practical implementation, with a focus on clinical decision support and operational efficiency.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News

item.title: FDA Real-Time Trials Initiative
item.description:
• Summary: The FDA has launched a new initiative to promote real-time clinical trials, partnering with companies like AbbVie, Kestrel, Lilly, and Profluent. The program aims to modernize trial design by leveraging continuous data monitoring and adaptive methodologies, potentially accelerating drug development and reducing costs. The initiative reflects a broader regulatory push toward digital and decentralized trials.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive

item.title: FDA Plan to Speed Clinical Trials
item.description:
• Summary: The FDA unveiled a plan to accelerate clinical trial timelines, which could reshape drug development and regulatory approval processes.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News

item.title: AI in Pharma R&D
item.description:
• Summary: A leading researcher advocates for bolder investment in AI for pharmaceutical R&D to enhance drug discovery and development efficiency.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News

item.title: Amgen and AstraZeneca FDA Cloud Trials
item.description:
• Summary: Amgen and AstraZeneca are collaborating with the FDA on a new initiative to harness cloud technology for real-time clinical trial monitoring and data analysis. The effort aims to streamline trial operations, improve data integrity, and accelerate decision-making. This regulatory innovation could set a precedent for how future trials are conducted across the industry.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: BioSpace

item.title: Q1 Earnings Roundup
item.description:
• Summary: A roundup of Q1 earnings highlights major industry events: Lilly struck multiple deals, Regeneron notched a historic approval, and the FDA raised several questions. The quarter saw significant financial maneuvering and regulatory milestones across the biopharma landscape.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: BioSpace

item.title: RFK Jr Peptides and FDA Policy
item.description:
• Summary: The article covers RFK Jr's interest in peptides and the anticipated FDA policy shift regarding compounding pharmacies, which could impact access to unapproved peptide therapies.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News

item.title: Biotech Angel Investing
item.description:
• Summary: The article discusses how biotech angel investors are adopting deeper due diligence and more disciplined approaches to early-stage investments.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: BioSpace

item.title: Altitude Labs Biotech Education
item.description:
• Summary: Altitude Labs offers a higher education program for biotech founders, aiming to equip them with necessary skills and knowledge.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: BioSpace
